articles.title: ‘Not built right the first time’ — Musk’s xAI is starting over again, again
articles.description: The AI lab is revamping its effort to build an AI coding tool, with two new executives joining from Cursor.
articles.author: Tim Fernholz

articles.title: Lawyer behind AI psychosis cases warns of mass casualty risks
articles.description: AI chatbots have been linked to suicides for years. Now one lawyer says they are showing up in mass casualty cases too, and the technology is moving
articles.author: Rebecca Bellan
